task:
Shotcut is already open with /home/user/Documents/combo.mlt (1920x1080 30 fps, empty timeline). Two source videos exist: /home/user/Videos/intro.mp4 and /home/user/Videos/outro.mp4.

Place intro.mp4 and outro.mp4 on the V1 timeline track so that outro.mp4's start overlaps the end of intro.mp4 by about half a second, producing a default dissolve (luma) transition in the overlap region. Apply a 'Fade In Video' filter (default parameters) to the intro.mp4 clip. Save the project so /home/user/Documents/combo.mlt references both clips, contains a luma (dissolve) transition, and contains a fade filter on the intro clip.

verification.description: A fade filter is present (Fade In Video)
